case_title: LUCIO MENESES VS. BOOST MOBILE LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-26-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOOST MOBILE LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT BOOST MOBILE LLC
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF LUCIO MENESES. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT BOOST MOBILE LLC. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED.(506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CSC LAWYERS INC. SERV) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENESES, LUCIO AS TO DEFENDANT BOOST MOBILE LLC
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY MENESES, LUCIO BOOST MOBILE LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-20-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LUCIO MENESES IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETERS MARLON VALASQUZ AND NINA SAFDIE. DEFENDANT BOOST MOBILE LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SALLY PARK STORE MANAGER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT: DEFENDANT WILL PAY THE PLAINTIFF $594 PLUS $45 FOR A TOTAL OF $639 AND REMOVE THE $33 CHARGE FROM HIS MONTHLY PHONE BILL. PARTIES MUST ATTEND THE AUG-08-2019 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT OR AGREEMENTS BREAKDOWN. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE AUG-08-2019 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $594.00 FILED BY MENESES, LUCIO AS TO DEFENDANT BOOST MOBILE LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
